title: The misuse of regulatory power for private gain represents a breakdown of integrity in public service. Comment.
description: Q7. The misuse of regulatory power for private gain represents a breakdown of integrity in public service. Comment. (10 M) Difficulty Level: Medium Reference: TH Why the question Recent corruption cases in regulatory institutions highlight ethical erosion in public service and raise concerns about misuse of discretionary power.
